creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
This works perfectly for me now.

Would you be happy to commit it?  If you're busy I'm more than happy to just stick in a new port ldb23.

I'm trying to parse your words below exactly- are you saying Samba413 relies on exactly ldb22?  I've been running it from package with ldb23 instead, but haven't tried compiling it together, but it does appear to all work.
